sora2.tool_description: A general-purpose video generation model. It is an API-based service with no local computational footprint, good quality, moderate speed, and moderate cost. Suitable for stable video generation with balanced quality and budget.

image_id.description: Image ID or path for reference.

wan2.5.tool_description: A high-performance general-purpose video generation model via API. Offers fast speed, no local resource usage, but high cost. Delivers top-tier video quality and is ideal for high-budget, time-sensitive applications.

wan2.2.tool_description: A local inference model for general video generation. Requires significant computational resources, slower speed, but incurs no ongoing cost. Best for cost-sensitive, offline deployment where speed is not critical.

GEbase.tool_description: A specialized embodied video generation model running locally. Very low quality, moderate resource usage, fast speed, and no cost.

diamond.tool_description: A specialized Atari game frame prediction model for next-step observation. Runs locally with minimal resource usage, fast speed, and no cost. Excels in game environment prediction with high fidelity.

WebDreamer.tool_description: A GUI prediction model that generates textual descriptions from screenshots. API-based, no local resources, fast speed, moderate cost. Specialized for GUI understanding and change prediction.

qwen_coder.tool_description: A code generation model via API. No local resources, fast speed, low cost. Optimized for coding tasks with solid performance and budget efficiency.

gpt_image_1.tool_description: A general-purpose image editing model via API. Good quality, no local resources, moderate speed, high cost. Suitable for versatile image editing across multiple tasks.

nano_banana.tool_description: A cost-effective general image editing model via API. No local resources, fast speed, low cost. Good for game frame and general image editing with high value.

qwen_image_edit.tool_description: A balanced general image editing model via API. No local resources, fast speed, moderate cost. Strong in structural consistency for image editing tasks.

chatgpt5.tool_description: A versatile multimodal text generation model via API. No local resources, fast speed, moderate cost. Performs well across multiple tasks including tool use and GUI description.

claude4.tool_description: A high-precision multimodal text generation model via API. No local resources, fast speed, high cost. Excels in tool use and code generation with top-tier accuracy.

chatgpt5_mini.tool_description: A lightweight multimodal text generation model via API. No local resources, fast speed, low cost. Strong in tool use simulation with high exact match rate, ideal for budget-aware deployments.

gemini3_flash.tool_description: A low-cost multimodal text generation model via API. No local resources, fast speed, very low cost. Good for tool use and GUI tasks but weaker in code generation. Best for cost-sensitive applications.
